recommendations.title: Wall Street: Money Never Sleeps
recommendations.overview: As the global economy teeters on the brink of disaster, a young Wall Street trader partners with disgraced former Wall Street corporate raider Gordon Gekko on a two tiered mission: To alert the financial community to the coming doom, and to find out

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.

recommendations.title: Funeral in Berlin
recommendations.overview: Colonel Stok, a Soviet intelligence officer responsible for security at the Berlin Wall, appears to want to defect but the evidence is contradictory. Stok wants the British to handle his defection and asks for one of their agents, Harry Palmer, to sm

recommendations.title: Blue Velvet
recommendations.overview: The discovery of a severed human ear found in a field leads a young man on an investigation related to a beautiful, mysterious nightclub singer and a group of psychopathic criminals who have kidnapped her child.

recommendations.title: Möbius
recommendations.overview: An FSB officer falls in love with his agent, an American woman who works as a trader in a Russian bank.

recommendations.title: Three Days of the Condor
recommendations.overview: When bookish CIA researcher Joe Turner finds all his co-workers dead, he, together with a woman he has kidnapped, must work together to outwit those responsible until he determines who he can really trust.

recommendations.title: Children of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Six children are found spread through out the world that not only have enormous intelligence, but identical intelligence and have a strange bond to each other.

recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.overview: A man vows to bring justice to those responsible for his wife's death while protecting the only family he has left, his daughter.

recommendations.title: Spycies
recommendations.overview: Vladimir and Hector, two secret agents opposed in every way, are trying to recover a top secret material stolen by unknown intruders.

recommendations.title: Kidnap
recommendations.overview: A mother (in her Minivan) stops at nothing to recover her kidnapped son.
